name: VIYEKO Architecture
description: High-level architectural overview of the VIYEKO roadside assistance platform.

keyObjects.requests: Array of Request objects, persisted to localStorage
keyObjects.selectedService: The service currently being configured in the modal
keyObjects.user: Hardcoded/Mocked user profile data (Firebase Auth bypassed)

uiPatterns: Mobile-first responsive layout with desktop sidebar
Interactive status timelines with Framer Motion
missingFeatures: Real-time Backend (No actual server for request dispatching)
Real Map Integration (Currently uses a simulated/mock map component)
Payment Gateway (Cost calculation exists but no checkout process)
Push Notifications (Necessary for background status updates)
Service Provider App (Currently just a toggle mode in the client app)
recommendations: Integrate Firebase or Supabase for real-time synchronization and Auth.
Implement Google Maps or Mapbox for actual location tracking and ETAs.
Add Razorpay or Stripe for payment processing in India.
Transition to a dedicated Provider App using a shared component library.
Implement PWA (Progressive Web App) features for offline functionality and home screen installation.
